---
name: frontend-ui-specialist
description: Use when Orchestrator delegates React component, CSS Module, accessibility, or presentational UI work.
---

# Frontend UI Specialist Skill

## Use this skill when

- React component markup changes.
- CSS Modules change.
- Accessibility or visual states are involved.
- Loading, empty, disabled, or error UI states are needed.

## Rules

- Keep components small and presentational where practical.
- Use semantic HTML before ARIA.
- Use CSS Modules.
- Avoid unnecessary `"use client"`.
- Keep business logic out of presentational components.
- Preserve existing visual patterns.

## Specialist report focus

Report component changes, CSS Module changes, accessibility decisions, and UI states.
